# REST Service Golden Vectors

These vectors characterize REST service discovery and service-description JSON mapping before KMP migration. They focus on deterministic model projection from device JSON into public service names, paths, actions, events, endpoints, details, and triggers; `RestServiceMappingCommonPolicyTest.kt` now executes shared common coverage for service-list defaults, service-description defaults, action/event/detail/trigger mapping, the wrong-type `services` Android/iOS platform split, and `sdk/rest-service/rest-service-mapping-readiness.json`/`rest-service-mapping-readiness` behavior-family coverage through `restServiceMappingReadinessManifestNamesEveryPreMigrationBehaviorFamily` for `service-list-name-path-mapping`, `service-list-empty-defaults`, `service-description-action-event-mapping`, `service-description-empty-defaults`, `wrong-type-services-platform-split`, `unknown-field-ignore-policy`, `platform-rest-service-vector-references`, and the `compile-verification-gate` before production REST service JSON mapping moves. Event compression and malformed compressed payload policy are pinned through platform fake-client tests and executable shared `RestEventCompressionPolicyCommonTest.kt` codec-ownership and readiness coverage, request error/empty-response behavior is pinned through executable shared `RestRequestTransportPolicyCommonTest.kt` command-capture, transport-outcome, and readiness coverage, and public facade service-list/description request planning plus response-error platform mapping and empty-success/malformed-success parse/decode failures are pinned through executable shared `RestFacadeRuntimePolicyCommonTest.kt` coverage. Additional REST operations and any shared gzip/deflate codec choice remain gated.

`rest-facade-runtime-readiness.json` names the pre-migration behavior-family gate for the public REST facade runtime slice: service-list and service-description request paths, JSON success mapping, service path/action/event/detail/trigger fields, request-failure terminals, empty-success and malformed-success parse/decode failures, model JSON mapping vector references, empty-response and response-error transport policies, public facade error mapping, platform facade vector references, and the `compile-verification-gate` must remain covered before production REST facade planning moves into shared KMP code.

`rest-request-transport-readiness.json` names the pre-migration behavior-family gate for low-level REST request transport: service-list and service-description GET paths, response-error status/message mapping, empty successful response policy, fake PFTP request harness, facade error mapping deferral, platform transport vector references, and the `compile-verification-gate` must remain covered before REST request orchestration moves into shared KMP code.

`rest-event-compression-readiness.json` names the behavior-family gate for REST event notification decoding: uncompressed payload preservation, empty batch emission, notification payload order, Android gzip, iOS deflate, malformed compressed payload platform split, platform event vector references, the shared-platform-actual codec decision, and the `compile-verification-gate` must remain covered now that REST event payload decoding moves through shared KMP platform actual codecs.
